reason: Frontend package conventions and routing for the Vue theme change.
Semantic theme-token ownership, App.vue theme flow, compact uTools UI, overlays, controls, and accessibility conventions.
Theme quality gates, host-critical state contrast, raw-color restrictions, lint/build, and visual regression expectations.
Keep host entry lifecycle ownership in App.vue and avoid duplicating resolved visual state in Pinia.
Reuse the existing updateTheme function and semantic token tree instead of adding a second theme abstraction.
Official uTools API evidence, current lifecycle gap, palette boundary, and validation matrix.
